meta.subject: Mathematics
meta.source: NCDC Primary Six Curriculum Set One, Mathematics Syllabus

topics.title: Set Concepts up to Two Categories
subTopics: Listing members, equal and equivalent sets
Intersection and union of two sets on Venn diagrams

topics.title: Whole Numbers up to 10,000,000
subTopics: Place values and values up to Ten Millions
Writing numbers in words and expanded form
Roman numerals up to M (1000) and Base Five conversions

topics.title: Operations on Whole Numbers
subTopics: Long addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division

topics.title: Fractions, Decimals and Percentages
subTopics: Operations on proper and mixed fractions
Place values of decimals and conversions
Ratios, simple proportions, and percentage calculations

topics.title: Geometry and Angle Properties
subTopics: Angles on a straight line and intersecting lines
Constructing 90°, 60°, and 30° angles using ruler and compasses
Perimeter and area of rectangles, triangles, and parallelograms

topics.title: Data Handling and Simple Algebra
subTopics: Bar graphs, line graphs, and simple pie charts
Forming and solving simple one-step linear equations
